channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Senate college sports bill faces critical two-week stretch
item.description: Lawmakers are negotiating changes to a sweeping college sports bill as supporters warn the current NIL system could threaten women’s sports programs.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Sarasota home sales surge as inventory tightens in June
